shorts.title: New sports complex to open on land planned for data center
shorts.title_distilled: New sports complex to open on land planned for data center.
shorts.description: DICKSON CITY, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A new sports complex is now planned for land once zoned for a data center— giving residents a different vision for the future. While the plot of land in Dickson City does not look like much, soon this area is set to become the home of an indoor sports [...]

shorts.title: Getting ready for NEPA Armed Forces Day Parade
shorts.title_distilled: Getting ready for NEPA Armed Forces Day Parade.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A patriotic tradition is getting ready to step off in the Electric City. The northeast PA Armed Forces Day Parade begins Saturday at 11 a.m. Organizers say the walk celebrates and recognizes the service of men and women who sacrifice their lives for our freedom.
